bodyHtml:
Your active investigations

What you're tracking right now. Each has a resolution criterion; when an investigation resolves, state the answer plainly in your output and the goal will be updated.

  1. [g_fdb703ac71f343c8] thesis: 家装链从新房beta切换到存量翻新/出海 - Hypothesis: 家装主驱动已由新房竣工beta转向存量房翻新、以旧换新补贴和出海；超额收益集中在零售化、现金创造强、低房企应收的细分龙头，而工程重和补贴排除品类是陷阱。 - Resolves when: Resolved when two consecutive reporting periods show either (a) tracked names' renovation/export-driven orders and operating cash flow both improve despite continued weak completions, confirming the thesis, or (b) orders or operating cash flow fail to improve after subsidy/export channels remain available, invalidating - Linked entities: 兔宝宝, 三棵树, 北新建材, 伟星新材, 好太太, 富森美, 坚朗五金 - Research project: rp_0f8a8b0d99ed46d3 - Last progress: today

  2. [g_4c9c2d9974d54b56] open_question: 收储去库三约束能否真实落地 - Resolves when: Resolved when final implementation rules and first material transactions either explicitly establish central loss-bearing/funding, acquisition discounts deep enough to avoid subsidizing developers, and enforceable new-supply controls, or when executed deals proceed without these three constraints and show the policy ca - Linked entities: 中央财政, 地方政府, 保障房收储, 房地产开发商 - Last progress: today
